```plantuml
@startuml

interface Collection
interface List

abstract class AbstractCollection
abstract class AbstractList

class ArrayList {
    Object[] elementData
    int a
    size()
}

enum TimeUnit {
    DAYS
    HOURS
    MINUTES
}

List --|> Collection
AbstractCollection ..|> Collection
AbstractList --|> AbstractCollection
AbstractList ..|> List
ArrayList --|> AbstractList

@enduml
```
